reviews.review_title: Lacks a little bit of content
reviews.review_description:
I mean it's fun to play but after that it just gets boring,also the music is kind of weird?
But if you're a doom eternal fan you should get it.
Also I gave it 5 stars because I'm a doom eternal fan and I had fun.

reviews.review_title: Don't listen to all the one stars
reviews.review_description: this game is an amazing doom rogue like vr game the people complaining about graphics clearly don't understand the limits of a quest the game play is fun with the heavy emphasis on movement and the rogue like element is addicting i highly recommend this game
It's the closest thing to DOOM VR and it's fun and cool asf
One of the best games I’ve ever played
Its a good game, but there's a stick drift problem. Its not me, I played 4 games and I didn't have stick drift.  Maybe it is me, or I'm using a Meta Quest 2, but probably the game
Fast paced perfect combat I love It

broken textures boring combat. Trying to be a doom roguelite but it doesnt go hard.
 also it barely explains your gear which is kind of important in a roguelite.
Its a good game expecially for a doom fan

This game might be amazing, but sadly, I can't get that far into it due to a giant bug only for quest 3. Whenever you play with a quest 3 the left lens will break and freeze on a frame and put lines all over the left lenses screen. The bug happens almost every time, and it's so horrible as it can cause massive migraines. These devs need to get there act together and release a new update it's been over a year since their last update, and this is unacceptable. When this game gets a update and is more fixed I will gladly change my review as it seems like it would be a good game, but I'm not keeping my left eye closed the whole time to play it.

For me it’s not the glitchy left eye ( I found that on my headset you can open the ingame or meta menu and close it to fix it ) or the weird reloading, it’s just the pace of gameplay. It really hurts me that this game doesn’t excite me, in the trailer it has high intensity-fast pace gameplay. However my experience is that the hooks arefery slow and awkward, you can’t spring while shooting because you need to aim ( the game requires you to wave your arms to sprint) and the chainsaw just doesn’t work, so when you try to have nice fluid combos, just forget about it. This is coming from the same people who made STRIDE, the movement in dead hook should have been mastered by now. Please do better, this HAD potential, but it was all thrown out.

reviews.review_title: Visual glitch. Fun if it worked
reviews.review_description:
This game is a wonderful doom inspired sci fi slayer power trip. Even with the spazzy chain movement I didn't get sick. 

Unfortunately, there is a persistent visual glitch that keeps showing up making seeing next to impossible.  
Requesting refund. I really wanted to like Dooms VR cousin.

I don't know why I ignored this game for so long, but better late than never. Is really fun specially if you are a DOOM fan like me, the shooting is great and the Hook mechanic is a lot of fun, I am enjoying this game
Joy way.....wtf happened here?
I expected so much more joy and playtime from this but now it’s sitting in my uninstalled being one of the many games I wish I just refunded so now it collects dust

I have decided to wipe my save file and start over to fix the issues. Admittedly it DID solve some of the issues such as when you go into a healer of the dead challenge (seriously these names are super long and I genuinely couldn't care less) and when you chainsaw the main enemy but the shields wouldn't go away.

The problem is this... There isn't going to be anymore updates, but this game still has issues. It has really opened my eyes as to how Joyway really doesn't give a crap about the quality of their games anymore, considering that the game on launch was FILLED TO THE BRIM with glitches. And they decided that it was good to release it in such a state.

My next problem comes in the fact that some of the resources just appear whenever they feel like. The organic crystals are by far the most rare item in the game and I despise that.

This game is also far too easy considering that you can just go into your magic menu by pressing one of the forward buttons and you can just hold that down for as long as you want and the enemies can't do a thing about it.
WHY THE HELL HAS THIS GAME NOT GOTTEN MORE TRACTION OR UPDATES…it’s a pity this is the closest we can get to doom without playing hellsweeper or useing pcvr
Good game but I want a perk where I can eat the demons for health😛😛

I love the game but it has a couple of bugs that need to be fixed:
- My left lens on Quest 3 starts tearing up like having an inverted rectangle image in. It's the only game that causes this.
- loot crates are sometimes unbreakable, and if they break they disappear into nothing without any animation or sound.

reviews.review_title: It's a mess but a good one...
reviews.review_description: Fabulous game that's unique from the others. Everything is good about it apart from one thing. I can't take my weapon from my right holster on my back it just doesn't work. It will work for maybe 5 min in the first room, but then it will just break.

After playing the game since launch date, and beating the game numerous times I would like to talk what's good and what's holding this game back. First the good : once you really get the swinging mechanic down the game is Hella fun, and keeps me coming back for more. The weapons are of a good design and fun to use with a great reload mechanism. I really feel like the game needs some updates to address the frame rate drops. especially in the second act after after you beat the guardian (aka the first boss.) also the ability to hook enemies and pull life from them all but disappears as you upgrade your weapons. This seems counter intuitive for game based on movement dodging enemies and recovering Health through hooking mechanisms. The entire idea is to upgrade and get better weapons, but it seems moot when you have to carry an extra weaker weapon so you don't damage you foe too much,so you can get some health from them. This can be mitigated to a point by obtaining life stealer and skull collector upgrades but these usually don't come along until way later in the game towards the end if you get them at all. I just feel like for a game based on hooking your enemies that you should always be able to draw some health at some point. I hope this is addressed in the future along with smoother frame rates.  update 2025 the game has received numerous updates since my original review but has game breaking bugs that just aren't getting addressed. One that occurs often for me is a picture within a picture in the left lens of my quest 3. Again it usually happens in the second act of the game after you beat the guardian of the eye aka the first boss. Playing the game a certain scene will lock in the left lens and you can only see out of the right lens it's basically a picture within a picture on the left side of the headset. If this could get fixed it would be great. Also I would really like to see the selector wheel that lets you choose which power you want to use such as flame ice or gust it needs to have a lock in so you don't have to try to select it every single time. This could easily be accomplished by pushing in the thumb stick since thumbstick click isn't being used in the game for anything. Just these couple of minor fixes could Elevate this game to one of the best swinging games on the platform but it just seems to be largely abandoned at this point.

Ever since I bought this game due to the inspiration of DOOM, this game has been a blast and I am loving how the story goes, but every time I try to play it again it continues to not only let me complete one level in the beginning but outta nowhere enemies spawn I kid you not, so many of them that my game crashes every single time. Like when is the bugs, crashes and errors of this game going to be fixed? I hate to not leave a good review about this game cuz I really enjoy it. 
I am hoping this will get fixed soon. Otherwise people are gonna try this game and get the same experience I'm getting which is not in a good way.

I love the game but… please fix these bugs 
Cons: its buggy, i think after 8-11 Ive gotten bugs that crashed or glitched my game entire left lense for a few minutes where it would freeze and strobe the screen so i had to close my left eye till the game fixed itself or upon death in the game it fixed. Terrible bug worst ive experienced in a game.

Why cant the coin bank hold more than $1000 this should be infinite. 

The laser weapon and others hit the top right HUD like its an invisible wall. Ruins my accuracy .

Pros: 
good graphics 

Good weapons

Replay value

Boss battles feel great, probably my fav part of the game.

Great job devs but please help fix these bugs.

reviews.review_title: Great game let down by bugs
reviews.review_description: Feel the devs need to patch bugs in this game. First level and im faced with a screen in a screen effect. This is annoying bevause it seems like a great game. Not sure why the devs havnt polished the product more. Im using a quest 3. It may not be optmised for the q3. Mechanics are very fun and are more engrossing than maybe swarm.

I would definitely buy it again. Like the other reviews have said it has bugs, but not like the ones I've encountered. The bugs are silly ones. It won't unlock a few side missions even though I've completed them several times. Occasionally the colors render a bit off. Nothing that would make the game up playable. It has never crashed or froze my headset.

The potential for such a great game is here, but the mechanica are janky and glitchy, instead of ripping apart your enemies, they just explode as soon as you touch them. Everything feels unsatisfying and janky, and if you told me this was a meta horizons world I would believe you. The sad part is, all this game needs is a bit more refining. Make the physics engine better, make it more physics based, make it so you actually have to rip apart your enemies instead of them exploding the second my hand comes near them.
If you're not big on immersion and just enjoy seeing enemies go boom, this might be enjoyable for you, but if you came to experience a bloodfest like Doom Eternal where you can really feel every hit, you will be sorely disappointed.
I love this game I at first was gonna refund it but it’s so fun the strider pistol is goated it’s just a bit janky sometimes

Hehehe chainsaw hand go nyyyyyyyeeeeeeeooooooouuuuuurrrrmmmmmm!


The game is awesome,  my brother said it's dumb to him but my response was WOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO
I love this game soooooo much like bro it is spiderman and doom combined and it makes you feel like the boss.
The only thing they fear is... you

I loved the game so much and even recommended it to my friends. It worked really well but now it's full of glitches.

On my Q3 it has low and inconsistent frame rate and rendering artifacts in the left eye. It makes the game completely unplayable. As I can see I'm not the only one with these problems. 

I would be happy to give the game 5 stars when you fix it.

I wasn’t sure about this one before I bought it but I was pleasantly surprised by how polished and fun it is.  The swinging feels perfect. It took a few rounds to figure out the aiming but now I’ve got it down. LOVE the upgrade system. Gives you a bunch of improvements to aim for for hours and hours. 
Buy it.

UPDATE: Was 5 stars but since the last update the game is completely broken. After 5 mins or so in a round, my movement suddenly locks up. The only way I can travel anywhere is by hooks, but even that’s broken since it won’t latch onto enemies for execution anymore either.  I went on Discord to ask for some help and received ZERO help. Fix it asap, and I’ll bump back up to 5 stars. If you need me to send video, I will. I already posted it on Discord, but like I said, to no avail


2nd UPDATE: 
Even though I’m a little upset that nothing was done to address my problem, after deleting the app AND the data, I was able to get my game back to normal… but I lost all my upgrades and had to take a bunch of time earning them back. So while I’m a little upset at the lack of any help from the developer (both here and on Discord), it’s not a 1 star game anymore nor would it be fair to keep my score at 1. But I refuse to give this anymore more than 4 stars. Be warned, if you encounter problems, you’ll likely be quickly dismissed in their discord like I was. All I kept getting from other people was “asked and answered”, meaning I have to go thru days of discord convos to find the 1 person who asked a similar question. When I finally did find it, the answers were “don’t know, sounds like you’re scre*ed”. Super helpful Discord channel 😒

Final update:
Nothing has been fixed, they nerfed my favorite weapon and there’s been zero updates (no content or bug fixes of any kind) in 6+ months. This game ended up being NO JOY

reviews.review_title: Do not buy this - its broken
reviews.review_description:
For the record, I love the game/gameplay. Had it on PSVR2 and it was near flawless. The game itself is great, totally recommend it - if/when they fix it.

After a certain period of play expect a gigantic flashing rectangle to appear in one eye without warning and sometimes for several minutes. Could see this causing seizures in particularly susceptible players but for anyone it's a genuine headache and ruins the entire experience.

There's no fix, settings combo that removes it. Have asked about a fix in discord for months and the developers have clearly no interest in fixing or even addressing the many folk asking for a fix.

If it gets patched, cool I'll update to 5 stars. But please be advised until then this is unplayable once you reach the skill to get to first boss.

Devs, please fix 🙏

Much as I feel the developers selective ignorance shouldn't be rewarded with your money, if you must buy this game at least get it on PSVR2

The idea of a VR Doom Eternal is quite interesting, the same type of exhilarating combat experience through VR makes it really interesting, and Dead Hook makes an attempt to give that experience to standalone quest. Notice I said “Attempt” because in actuality, it’s some serious slop. Please tell me if I’m doing something wrong because man the game gets excruciatingly boring fast. 

1: Movement, The movement system in Dead Hook is quite interesting, obviously most of it is centered around grappling. Sounds fun, it’s not, well, it would be, if not for the claustrophobic yet massive arenas. Sure the arenas are huge, but it feels hard to traverse, there aren’t enough areas that you can use for sprinting, just small platforms, so you can’t do that much. If you try to settle on one of those platforms you’ll be swarmed by enemies instantly and you have to grapple away, and because of how much quicker it is to grapple, grabbing ledges is pointless. 

So really all you do is grapple, which, hey, if the system for grappling is good why care right? It’s not, you can’t use any predictable paths to swing from because of the boost it gives you at the start of your swing. So all it’s good for is spamming to fly around the map to dodge the constant barrage of enemy fire. It feels unsatisfying and impossible to slowdown to reasonable speeds.

2:The gameplay, you’ve Already heard about the poor mobility system and map design. And guess what, it gets worse, firstly, I want to talk about the enemies. Most enemies either remove your ability to move or force you to. Put them in a small room together, and you’ve got Dead Hook. constantly needing to run and somehow aim simultaneously. In games like Doom or Ultrakill you only do one at a time ensuring you can actually take down enemies. But in Dead Hook you just keep running and trying to shoot at the same time. And don’t get me started on the gunplay and actual fighting, it’s so unsatisfying, in Doom or Ultrakill your weapons feel powerful, they tear through enemies so long as you hit them. In Dead Hook everything feels weak, you need to hit many consecutive shots to take down enemies you once could one-shot. And the weapons are all boring, you can only hold 2 or 4 of them and they don’t encourage you to try new weapons, they’re all bad, just some are less bad. For example the grenade launcher, slow, but powerful, unlike every grenade launcher ever though, it’s got 0 AOE damage and just ends up being a pistol with bullet drop. Also there are a lot of enemies, not in the fun way more like the repetitive combat loop way.

3:The style, spoiler it’s got none, the bosses and enemies are uninteresting and look like knock-off Doom enemies, and all of them except like 1 or 2 are strictly ranged, which is extremely irritating. The maps are blank and lack depth, and the soundtrack is so boring, really highlights the rest of the game I guess. It’s just stock rock music, it isn’t interesting or special in anyway like Ultrakill’s soundtrack. And another irritating feature is their constant use of slow motion every time you kill an enemy. I’ll give them points for the upgrade system though, it’s interesting to create your own injections, but it so horrifically slow. I’d rather just have a skill tree to be honest. I kind of wish the maps went room to room, a couple enemies each. rather than annoying arena to bothersome arena, flooded with Infernals.

In conclusion, I don’t get why people froth over this game because it’s like VR Doom, I guarantee none of them have ever even played Doom. I wish the game had a better fighting loop and not just throwing yourself at enemies over and over again. Something that allowed more skillful play and awarded players for it. I wish Dead Hook had a better movement system, better map design and style, better combat system, and a better enemy and boss design. I get that’s a lot to wish for, but there is no way you can actually interpret Dead Hook as finished, this is a rough draft of a game at best.

Bad dialogue, bad mechanics, and an unplayable gamemode all make up this trash of a game, I don't usually mind crude humorous dialogue, Arizona Sunshine, to state one game that does this but this game takes crude humor and just makes it cringe only good thing is the gore effects I wouldn't recommend this game in a million years. The gameplay seems cool at first, but it eventually just stems off in the "Shoot this guy and then shoot him next." Boring lackluster gameplay where I'm not doing anything I expect to be doing like tearing people apart. Yeah, sure, you can do that, but the game makes it almost impossible to pull something like that off. The gamemode I thought i was getting out of this was a free for all type of mode, which it has, but is almost unplayable that crap with making health potions and enemies not even spawning bs is just annoying, oh yeah almost forgot the game lags like evert second. I want a refund.

I was excited for this game and the first couple hours were fun. Now I've realised it's just the same thing over and over but harder. You start over from the beginning every time. You can sell your weapons when you get to your first safe point, but the pittance you get versus how much a weapon is worth is lame. 

You get one health thing at the safe point and that's it. Oh and BTW the lava in the safe point is deadly still so careful skyhooking around. 

Honestly the game is worth 5.99 and not a penny more. I would refund it if I didn't wait too long. People call it Doom for the vr, and it is riding hard on you thinking that. It's not. Just go play Mini Doom on your phone for a better experience.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback

reviews.review_description: Worst inventory system, bad movement, overall not a lot of content. DO NOT BUY JUST BECAUSE YOU LIKE DOOM. The graphics are the only positive thing I could say about this
it should be in Lab, because its like some sandbox demo with bugs, wouldnt play it even if it was free

reviews.review_title: Doom vr meets spider man vr
reviews.review_description:
Having a lot of fun with this one.  Very doom oriented and the chains offer visceral combat. Not big on rouge games but the plot kinda ties it together and the lab use for upgrades kinda breaks up the gameplay.  Long term goals mixed with short burst of pick up and play works for me.

Now for the grips.  The store offers upgrades and whatnots but I can't see my balance.  Buying stuff when you can't tell how much you got is troubling (update its beneath right hand just need clearification). The arenas seem to have too many obstructions for chain slinging (suggest destructible stalactites excetera) Gust has too many misfires and I would like to use the blades more often if I can figure out how to access them in the first place. Executions could benefit from for cinematic effects (the kinda just explode)  I would rip and tear but I don't think the rippers are working at all.
Edit... Update details ripper blades charge from tearing enemies only but you can only tear weakened enemies. You are quickly mowing down enemies that die before they weakened meaning you can only use the blades in the first few rooms when guns are low level. Either bring it back to per kills or allow grab and rip on non weakened enemies. Lost a star for this one.

This game is extremely great if you feel like breaking something. But if you want to break something, you have to break A lot of stuff. When I mean stuff..I mean demons. You can take your anger on these horrible looking demons and have fun while doing so…but there is just one flaw. Although when I killed all the demons, I tried three times to defeat my first boss, but to no success. It is very difficult to just beat the first boss. The more I struggle I have with boss, the less demons I want to kill. It has gone to the point where I wanted to delete it, and so I did. I will not be playing this game for a while. I’ve wanted to play this game because it was the first ever game I put into my wishlist. You guys have outdone yourselfs and I would want to see more games to come. This one was a waste of 20$…..maybe.

The game feels like it was made in a day, a lot of the environments are very literally just grey rectangles.

The gunplay is just pointing forward and holding the trigger until the enemy dies(same with stride.) guns have no impact or force behind them making them very comparable to NERF guns, they even do similar damage.

The hooks are probably the worst I've ever felt from a game due to being overly sensitive and not reacting the way you should expect, some applab games with one developer do hooks better.

Once it softlocked me in a weird alchemy section because it did not clearly explain what I had to do

Also does not have controller drift accessibility features(same with stride yet again)
Can you add a save button so I wont have to keep fighting bosses just to get to the other world it’s annoying when I have to beat bosses again and again

I have played stride for a while and saw stack in beta I tried that out and WOW!!!!! I thought it couldn’t get any better and then I saw dead hook! I immediately bought it AND I HAVE NO REGRETS!!!! This game has super fast combat and I LOVE how you can reload guns with other guns! Just buy the game!! Once in a while you will fall out of the map but for a game like this it RARELY happens! Joy way if you are reading this I love stack, stride, and dead hook! I play almost each one daily!!!! And I have 1 suggestion for dead hook! So when I am fighting in the arena, sometimes I run out of health really fast and dead hooking enemies doesn’t give me enough health, so I’m constantly dead hooking every single enemy. Well, I suggest is putting a healing syringe somewhere, hidden in the arena and make it worth 100-200 maybe even 300 coins. So players can buy it in the middle of a fight! That’s all from me! Joyway hopefully you read this because I love this game!!!!!!


One last thing… when you go into stride and look to the right, you’ll see “other games from joyway” and it says stack is out but i says dead hook is not out yet. So I would update that!!

This game is very fun and fast paced and mechanics work very well but the reload movement when both hands are occupied don’t work very well also the ice boss just stops working and doesn’t even attack but overall a very good game 8/10

developer_response.body: Thanks for youe feedback and your support! If you come across any bugs in the game, please report them by visiting our new bug report form at support.joyway.games.

reviews.review_description:
Killing demons like doomguy while flying through the air like spider-man. What more could you want? 

Great movement, big guns, lots of violence. If you like that kind of stuff, get the game.
It’s good but it’s hard

I've been playing this for a few weeks now, was having a decent time, not great but decent, plenty of bugs and issues. Launched it today to find my save file has been wiped, probably by the new update, thanks for that. This is some amateur hour nonsense.

developer_response.body: Hi! Please, send a report to our tech support at https://support.joyway.games/ with your save file. You can find it here: Computer\Quest 2\iternal storage\Android\data\com.JoyWay.DeadHook\files\settings and our devs will solve the problem as soon as possible.

reviews.review_description: Please fix the unwelcoming glitches there has been a few times I got stuck outside the level and especially when it's the battle with the Beatle boss. But the game is awesome! I would be moving around with the link chains and I kept going up and up and up and until I couldn't go back down. I'm just above the whole square of the map where the level I can see how you created the game type thing. You need to make walls to where you have no glitches please. Thank you 🙏

developer_response.body: Hey! Thanks for playing Dead Hook! Ofc we will fix the glitches in the upcoming updates, do not worry about it ;-)

reviews.review_description:
Best $22.13 I've ever spent.
and by best, I don't mean best $20 game. I mean BEST game. I got through to the final boss, but lost to it. All the maps and areas are detailed really well, the enemies are really unique, I can't name a game better than this.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support ❤️

reviews.review_description: This title is exactly what you think it’s going to be DOOM meets SWARM . Fast paced fun bullet slinging chaos with a rouge like setup with perks. DEVS-Only draw back I have is grabbing the weapons over my shoulders out of holsters, grab and grab and grab then  at other times it’s smooth .

developer_response.body: Hey! Such issues will be improved in the future updates. To saty tuned join our official discord community https://discord.gg/Gwrp63As

reviews.review_description: I never thought I would be plaing Doom VR with Spiderman movement, but I don't regret my $20 being spent on this game, the weapons are unique, you can play it at any time because it doesn't exactly have a main story, and the fact that I can charge up and ultimate and get a Beam Sword on both of my arms is just cool. You won't regret getting this game
Seamless blend of gameplay mechanics, storytelling, and impressive visuals, Dead Hook is a must-play for fans of rogue-like and shooter games.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Dead Hook! 🔥

reviews.review_description: Very good game

reviews.review_title: Where has this been all my life
reviews.review_description:
I love it it's simply just amazing it's doom if doom guy was spiderman 😂 coming from joyway I was very worried about this game but I see why they kinda tanked stride 
Stride solo is great red flowers is interesting for sure and stack is well it's stack but this game it's freaking phenomenal joyway please for the love of God keep this up and please please don't f this game up you've restored my faith in you for sure 
( It dose have a few issues but I haven't ran into anything to game breaking as in the guns not registering in the holsters mainly noticed when trying to switch out guns while safe not in combat, I had a gun disappear on me trying to put it back in the holster in sanctuary kinda my fault tho , gun floating too high for me to grab while on ground)

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Dead Hook! We are glad you enjoy the game!

reviews.review_description: New game so a few bugs and glitches here and there but is overall amazing but I wish there was a jump button constantly hooking and grabbing ledges gets old at some point

developer_response.body: Thanks for your high rate for Dead Hook! Ofc we are working on bug fixes and if you come across any bugs in the game, please report them by visiting our new bug report form at support.joyway.games

reviews.review_description: All around it was an amazing game. I haven’t played much but it’s really fun. I did run into a bug where the final boss of the first stage stopped working he just wasn’t attacking and my shots where just going through him. Otherwise it was a great game and experience
It’s DOOM Eternal VR. Buy it.

reviews.review_title: I'm starting to regret buying a Quest
reviews.review_description: Cringe music, Cringe UI, Cringe voice acting, Cringe gameplay, Cringe art style. Roguelike after roguelike after roguelike. Games like these are why normal gamers make fun of VR.

developer_response.body: Anyway thanks for trying! We hope that you will find the game you really like.

reviews.review_title: I was so close to the end
reviews.review_description: I was almost at the end when i went on a bathroom break and when i got back i was in the ship and needed to restart the entire thing please make it so the game just pauses when you remove the headset

developer_response.body: Hey! If you come across any bugs in the game, please report them by visiting our new bug report form at https://support.joyway.games/.

reviews.review_description: Only problem im struggling with is how i keep on accidentally smashing the viles you use to upgrade

developer_response.body: Hi! If you have any questions concerning the gameplay, you can always join our discord community and our experienced mods will help you ^^

reviews.review_description: Very fun and fast paced

reviews.review_title: So much fun... but is it enough...
reviews.review_description:
Kill everything, then upgrade your gear after each run to make you stronger, tougher, then start killing everything again, Thats it basically with a story thrown in there also. 

It’s like those classics of Unreal Tournament/ Time Splitters, with Spiderman thrown in, to mix it up, its just shooting and mayhem.

The monsters look great, and you glide around really well, its very spacious, and the guns sound tremendous, however…. I wish the gun selection and modding was easier… I understand the collecting of parts to make potions at Starbucks to upgrade your health, armour etc… but I still don’t understand the gun upgrades, it would be far better if you could start off with the bare basics of a gun, then update it as you progress, and then be able to select which guns you carry into battle.

I really do think these games need Multiplayer like the ole classics, first team to reach 100 kills, last man standing, capture the flag, I just think it would make you want to come back to the game.
This game is a bag of fun, but theirs not enough to make ME want to keep coming back to it time and time again.

Though I have only put 3/4 hours playtime into this game so far, so maybe more is going to open up to me as I battle my way through.

But its great to swing around like Spiderman on Crack! that's why I give it 5 stars.

*I'll be uploading my footage of this game to 'Gotcha VR' on Youtube in the next couple hours.

developer_response.body: Thanks for yoyr feedback and support! We will be waiting for you video on YouTube 😉

reviews.review_description:
EDIT: DEVS, PLEASE , HO PLEASE FIX/FINISH YOUR GAME

The most Doomlike of Roguelike 

so Far in VR

limited content even for a roguelike but one of the best standalone game on the Metastore. Not a lot of game are fun enough on standalone but that little new born early release from mama Spidy and papa Doom is fun

Edit: BUT !! --  FULL OF GAMEBREAKING/FUNBREAKING BUGS AND CLEARLY AN UNFINISHED PRODUCT.. disappearing guns, automatic doors not opening, progress of quests don't update, no sound on 80% of effect lag passed the 7-8th room, and many many more. 

I'm starting to think like a conspiracy theorist.. it's like the bugs are a feature and not a bug, looks like they didn't finish the game and put so many barriers so people don't get to the unfinished (more unfinished i guess) parts of the map. Everything pass the first "store pit stop" is scattered with lags and weird game breaking problems.

So sad because the gameplay is so fun, i find myself going back playing it anyway... until i get frustrated and close the game

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for the detailed review and honest feedback. It's a pity that you have  such issues with the game. Please, try to give the game another chance a little bit later. Some mechanics will continue to be refined, and of course, bugs will be addressed in future updates. If you encounter any difficulties with the game, please submit a report to our support team at https://support.joyway.games/.

reviews.review_description: You can swing like spiderman and kill some monsters. I like it👍

reviews.review_title: Great game but the bugs are an issue
reviews.review_description: This game is great as it's the perfect mix of doom and something like resist in VR although the bugs can be an issue as clipping into objects or out of the map is not common but still easy to do and there is a glitch with the upgrades where the syringe won't go away and not even uninstalling will make it go away but outside of those few bugs this game is great and a lot of fun.
Just add melee combat without having to do a finisher

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback and the suggested idea!

reviews.review_title: Thrilling VR Experience Inspired by Doom
reviews.review_description:
DEAD HOOK is an exhilarating VR game that pays homage to the iconic Doom series while adding its own unique twists. The visuals are stunning, capturing the gritty atmosphere reminiscent of Doom's legendary environments.

The gameplay is smooth and responsive, delivering fast-paced combat encounters and satisfying gunplay. The virtual reality technology immerses you in the action, making every moment feel visceral and intense.

The game's sound design is top-notch, with a thumping soundtrack and immersive audio effects that enhance the overall experience.

DEAD HOOK offers challenging level design, power-ups, and upgrades, ensuring replayability and keeping you engaged.

In conclusion, DEAD HOOK is a must-play for Doom fans and VR enthusiasts alike. It successfully captures the essence of Doom while offering its own unique gameplay elements. Get ready for an adrenaline-fueled journey into the world of DEAD HOOK that will leave you craving more.

Love the game so far when it comes to fast pacing action games like this are easy to recommend whoever is into this like Doom games are. Awesome game guys and hopefully more updates you do will do more to bring the hype up and get it going.
Amazing game and the mechanics are great, but it would be better with a friend and slay Infernals together.

I played this game and I thought it was really boring from what I played it was just talking between some emo AI girl and a tik toc reader voice and some knock off doom guy/ spider man the only good thing is the swords but for the life of me I can’t get them out 👎👎👎👎

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review. If you encounter bugs with swords, we will be glad if you describe them in more detail or send us a video. This will help us fix the problem

Kept restarting and still couldn’t keep the gun. Hopefully it’ll get patched up but for now I’ll return it

reviews.review_title: Insane gameplay hampered by odd design
reviews.review_description:
The gun play is mind blowing, insanely fun and smooth. The dual wield reloads are SO satisfying. The hooks are a blast to use and a very welcome new layer of depth to a tried and true classic shooter formula. 

Where it falls apart for me is the upgrades system and the gust mechanic. The upgrade system is pretty obtuse and not very comfortable. Why is the player bouncing left to right and having to do things just out of reach? Why is there a compression level that doesn't even show a proper output (always reads zero)? Something like this should be designed compact, down a line, and the compression levels need to do something other than complicate the process. 

The gust mechanic is made too integral to gameplay to be as frustrating as it is to use. How am I meant to know when it has enough charge? How long do I hold the trigger at minimum? How long is too long? Why is there no easily accessible training for this mechanic? I'm getting some practice with it, but I imagine that this is something that will get a lot of people to quit.

Great game! The graphics are really good!
Easy to reload guns and store away!
Loads of different monsters as you play different rooms
Highly recommend this!
This is undoubtedly one of the most impressive games I have seen for the Quest in ages. So far I have found ZERO problems, the graphics are excellent, and I love its play mechanics similar to DOOM.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback! We are so glad you love Dead Hook!

reviews.review_description: I’ve played quite a few games on oculus, though most have been puzzle games. I usually avoid shooters because they blend in, but other than bonelab, this is the only vr shooter I consistently play. The game play loop is challenging but fun, and never really feels annoying, the guns feel good to control, upgrades and progression lets you progress even when you die, and the hooks add a layer of movement that really can change gameplay, also the swinging is some of the best Spider-Man like physics I’ve seen. 10/10

developer_response.body: We are so happy you love the game! Thank you for your support! ❤️

reviews.review_description: This game is supper cool but the thing that is weird  is that this game was hyped and in development for a while just to be unfinished? And it lacks enjoyment after 30 minutes I feel if they added more weapons and actual melee other than your super it should be awesome just slicing and dicing people without saving up your super
I love this game but I feel like the creators should add melee weapons and more guns

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for your ideas how to make the game better. There are a lot of things to do and improve the game, stay tuned ;-)

reviews.review_description:
I saw early footage of this game and immediately couldn't wait. I counted down the days until release and bought it as soon as physically possible. The graphics are stunning, being incredibly clear and crisp without sacrificing performance. The combat feels incredible and swinging through the air, gunning down and slicing up demons in VR, with the fantastic soundtrack blasting in the background, is such an amazing, adrenaline pumping feeling, that I can't even explain it in words, you have to try it yourself. With tons of upgrades and customization, this is a game that will keep you coming back for more, and there is nothing else quite like it. The controlled chaos of swinging through the air, dicing up the undead and flying across the map is something that can't be found anywhere else in VR. It's incredible, a must buy, and worth every penny.

UPDATE: they've done it again! Melee combat feels incredible and gave a whole new jolt of fun to this game, the tearing is awesome, just wish I could do more punching and stuff. Still awesome, still 110% work buying
When I played it for the first time I felt great
